speaker: Donald J. Trump
quote: we inherited a mess. We inherited the worst inflation in history
venue: Speech on the Economy in Rome, Georgia
claim_text: Trump said his administration inherited the worst inflation in U.S. history.

sources.publisher: Federal Reserve Economic Data (CPIAUCSL, BLS source)
BLS CPI News Release Archive (June 2022 CPI release)

assessment.rationale:
Evidence:
- The February 19, 2026 Rome speech transcript contains the "worst inflation in history" claim.
- The official CPI time series (BLS-sourced CPIAUCSL published by the Federal Reserve) shows a higher year-over-year inflation peak in 1980 than in 2022.
- The 2022 CPI spike under Biden was severe but did not exceed the historical postwar peak shown in the same official series.

Why This Is False:
- "Worst in history" requires being the highest recorded level.
- The official CPI record shows higher inflation occurred before the Biden period, so the wording is not accurate.

Shut Down False Argument:
- Reframing this as "worst in recent years" does not rescue the original claim, which says "in history."
- The same official CPI dataset used to describe 2022 inflation also shows earlier periods with higher inflation.
